hero.description: We design and build high-performance web apps, mobile solutions, and APIs that help businesses scale and transform in the digital age.

about.title:
Driven by Technology,
Fueled by Purpose
about.subtitle: A passionate team of engineers and designers building scalable digital products for global businesses.
about.text1: SevenFox is a full-stack software agency founded by engineers who believe great software should be both powerful and beautiful. We partner with startups and enterprises to design, build, and scale digital products that drive real results.
about.text2: From MVP to enterprise-grade platforms, our team handles every layer of the stack — frontend, backend, mobile, cloud infrastructure, and automation — so you can focus on growing your business.

services.title:
End-to-End
Software Services
services.subtitle: From beautiful interfaces to robust backends and cloud infrastructure — we cover the full development lifecycle.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Pixel-perfect, responsive UIs built with React, Angular, and Next.js. We craft fast, accessible, and delightful user experiences.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Scalable REST and GraphQL APIs with Node.js and NestJS. Clean architecture, secure data handling, and high performance.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps with React Native that feel native, perform great, and ship fast.

devops.title: DevOps & Cloud
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Azure — built for reliability and scale.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: End-to-end workflow automation, integrations, and bots that eliminate manual work and reduce operational overhead.

database.title: Database Design
database.description: Optimized schemas, migrations, and query tuning for PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, and Redis-backed systems.

technologies.title: Technologies We Use
technologies.description: We build with modern, battle-tested technologies chosen for performance, developer experience, and long-term maintainability.

portfolio.title:
Custom Software
Solutions
portfolio.description: A selection of projects where we turned complex requirements into elegant, high-performance software products.

projects.crmDesc: A full-featured CRM built for a 200-person sales team, integrating email, pipeline management, and analytics.
projects.ecommerceDesc: High-conversion storefront with Stripe payments, inventory sync, and a real-time order dashboard.
projects.bankingDesc: A secure React Native banking app with biometric auth, real-time transactions, and budget tracking.
projects.inventoryDesc: RESTful API handling 10M+ SKUs with real-time warehouse sync, barcode integration, and demand forecasting.
projects.reportingDesc: Automated PDF and dashboard generation from multiple data sources, reducing manual reporting time by 90%.

contact.title:
Let's Build Something
Amazing Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Tell us about it and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.ctaText: From idea to launch — we handle everything.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Building digital solutions that help businesses grow, scale, and lead in the digital age.
